name: Coleslaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure that the cabbage and carrots are chopped up into very fine pieces, about the size of rice kernels.
2. In a large bowl, combine the sugar, salt, pepper, milk, mayonnaise, buttermilk, white vinegar, and lemon juice. Beat until smooth.
3. Add the cabbage and carrots to the mixture. Mix well.
4. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
Makes 8-10 servings.
